assertions.assertion: Shows setting options.EmitStaticAudienceClaim = true in the IdentityServer options
assertions.rationale: The response does not mention EmitStaticAudienceClaim at all. It only suggests defining an ApiResource.

assertions.assertion: Explains that this emits a static audience claim of '{issuer}/resources'
assertions.rationale: Since EmitStaticAudienceClaim is not mentioned, there is no explanation of the {issuer}/resources audience value.

assertions.assertion: Mentions the alternative of defining an ApiResource as a more targeted approach
assertions.rationale: The entire response is about defining an ApiResource (lines 15-20). While it presents this as the primary approach rather than an alternative, it does mention it.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest using the Implicit grant type or any deprecated patterns
assertions.rationale: No mention of Implicit grant type or deprecated patterns. Uses GrantTypes.ClientCredentials.
